cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Game requires running "wineconsole Warsim.exe" in terminal. Music and sound effects still work perfectly. Don't try toggling fullscreen within the game, it'll just mess up the formatting a bit and then not fullscreen.
title: Warsim: The Realm of Aslona

notes: Not sure why the other users are reporting platinum, you literally have to work around Steam and launch it through the console(go to game directory in the console and run "wineconsole Warsim.exe").  Some window resizing issues, some text is is word wrapped and some is not, some font looks jaggy; it may be my system or the game, I have no idea.  Aside from that, it appears to work, sound and music play.
title: Warsim: The Realm of Aslona

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box after upgrading to Proton 4.11-3.
title: Warsim: The Realm of Aslona
